name: Gem & Loan of Beverly Hills
description_short: Gem & Loan of Beverly Hills buys, sells, and pawns luxury jewelry, watches, diamonds, and designer accessories with in-house appraisers and jewelers in Los Angeles.
description_long:
Gem & Loan of Beverly Hills is a luxury pawn shop and retailer located in Beverly Hills, California, specializing in high-end collateral-based lending and merchandise sales. The business operates as both a traditional pawn shop offering collateral loans and a luxury goods retailer, serving the Los Angeles metropolitan area with expertise in premium items.

The company offers collateral loans (pawning) on luxury watches, diamonds, and jewelry without requiring credit checks, providing immediate cash transactions. They also buy and sell authenticated luxury goods including Rolex and other mechanical watches, engagement rings, designer handbags (Hermes, Chanel), diamonds, and fine jewelry. On-site services include professional watch repair specializing in luxury brands like Rolex, Omega, Tag Heuer, and Breitling, as well as custom jewelry design and repair with their master jeweler. They maintain an inventory of estate jewelry and vintage pieces, with items listed across eBay ranging from $7,000 to $20,000+.

What distinguishes Gem & Loan is their combination of specialized expertise: in-house master jewelers for custom work and repair, certified appraisers for accurate valuations, and focus exclusively on authenticated luxury items with guaranteed authenticity guarantees on designer handbags. Their watch repair service targets precision restoration of high-end mechanical timepieces. The business model attracts customers seeking immediate liquidity against luxury assets without credit checks, plus those buying authenticated pre-owned luxury goods.

As a pawn shop, the primary limitation is that collateral loans carry inherent risks of item loss if loans aren't repaid, and while they advertise "lowest prices," pawn loan terms and buyout valuations depend on current market conditions and negotiation. The business targets a niche affluent clientele and may not serve mainstream consumer finance needs.
address: 263 La Cienega Blvd, Beverly Hills, CA 90211

company_info.headquarters: 263 La Cienega Blvd, Beverly Hills, CA 90211

pros: No credit checks required for collateral loans on luxury items
In-house master jeweler available for custom design, repair, and restoration
Specialized watch repair expertise for luxury brands (Rolex, Omega, Tag Heuer, Breitling)
In-house appraisers for accurate item valuations and fair collateral loan pricing
All designer handbags guaranteed authentic with authenticity verification
Immediate cash transactions without lengthy approval processes
Dual service model: collateral loans, buying/selling, and jewelry repair under one roof
cons: Collateral loans carry risk of losing pawned items if repayment terms are not met
Focuses exclusively on luxury/high-value items; not accessible for consumers with standard goods
Limited transparency on exact loan terms, interest rates, and repayment schedules on website
High minimum transaction values may exclude mainstream consumers seeking small quick loans
Pawn loan valuations subject to market fluctuations and business discretion
best_for: Affluent individuals needing quick liquidity against luxury watch or jewelry collections
Watch owners seeking specialized repair for high-end mechanical timepieces
Jewelry buyers seeking authenticated pre-owned designer pieces with authenticity guarantees
Those seeking custom jewelry design, restoration, or heirloom piece repair
diagnosis: Gem & Loan of Beverly Hills is best for affluent consumers seeking immediate cash via collateral loans on luxury assets, authenticated pre-owned luxury goods, or specialized jewelry/watch services. The primary caveat is that this is a niche luxury pawn shop—not suitable for mainstream personal finance needs, small emergency loans, or consumers with standard collateral.
services: Collateral-based loans (pawning) on luxury watches and jewelry without credit checks
Buying luxury watches including Rolex and other premium brands
Selling luxury watches with in-house appraisal for fair market value
Pawning diamonds and diamond engagement rings
Buying and selling diamonds throughout Los Angeles metro area
Professional watch repair for luxury mechanical watch brands
Custom jewelry design and creation with master jeweler
Jewelry repair and restoration of heirlooms
Buying and selling authenticated designer handbags
Buying and selling vintage and antique jewelry
eBay marketplace sales of luxury collectibles
